mirahezerequests-desc: Miraheze-specific extension for facilitating and automating various user requests
mirahezerequests-success: Your request has been successfully submitted.
mirahezerequests-nopermission: You do not have permission to view this request.
mirahezerequests-notcentral-text: This page is only available on the central requests wiki.
mirahezerequests-status-conflict: This request has already been completed and cannot be modified further.
requestaccount-username: What username do you wish your account to have?
requestaccount-username-help: Please tell us what username you wish for your user account.
requestaccount-reason: Why were you unable to create an account?
requestaccount-reason-help: Please select the reason why you were unable to create an account. If the reason you were unable to create an account is not listed in the first two options, please describe your issue there.
requestaccount-comments: If you want to include any other comments or details that will help us process your request, please list them here.
requestaccount-ccemail: CC me on this request's decision at my account's email address
requestaccount-consent: I consent to my request being reviewed by Miraheze staff and understand that my email address will be used to create the account if approved.
requestaccount-created-email-text:
Your account request has been approved, and an account was created for your email address on Miraheze named "$1", with password "$2".
You should log in and change your password immediately.

You may ignore this message, if this account was created in error.
requestaccount-created-email-title: Your Miraheze account request has been approved
requestaccount-declined-email-text:
Your account request was declined for the following reason:

$1

Unless stated otherwise, you may submit a new request.
requestaccount-declined-email-title: Your Miraheze account request was declined
requestaccount-explanation: Please describe the issues you faced, in detail. Please make sure to include any errors (in full) you got in order to facilitate the process for us.
requestaccount-explanation-help: Please describe the issue you faced in full. Make sure to include any error messages you received in full.
requestaccount-log-header: This is a log of account request approvals and declines.
